name: aieb-thin-plugin
description: Thin AI Employee Builder plugin shell that routes paid skills to the gated AIEB MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Routes AIEB skills through the gated MCP runtime.
interface.longDescription: A thin plugin shell for AI Employee Builder. It keeps routing and onboarding local while paid skill instructions are fetched from the licensed AIEB MCP server at runtime.
defaultPrompt: Create a skill for my workflow.
Build an MCP for my business.
Turn this into an AI employee.
